en: House (lit. khaneh — dwelling). +%d population cap. Cheapest Tier-1 building.
Farm (lit. mazra'eh — sown-place). Workers gather Grain over patient cultivation cycles.
Ore-source (lit. ma'dan — generative place where earth yields metal). Boosts adjacent mine yield +50%.
Sacred-flame container. Emits +1 Farr/min. Required for Tier-2 advance.
